mnemonics.title: 2PC Phases
mnemonics.content: Prepare & Commit (PC) - Like wedding vows: 1) Ask 'Will you?' (Prepare), 2) Say 'I do' (Commit)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a group decision: 1) Coordinator asks all nodes (thumbs up/down), 2) Broadcasts final decision

analogies.analogy: Like a multi-country business deal requiring all signatories to agree before finalizing
